---
title: "Assignment 3: Time-Series Forecasting"
author: "Curtis Meister"
date: "March 30, 2026"
output:
  pdf_document:
    latex_engine: xelatex
fontsize: 11pt
geometry: margin=1in
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE, warning = FALSE, message = FALSE)
options(keras.fit_verbose = 0)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(keras)
library(tensorflow)
library(reticulate)
```

```{r}
set.seed(123)
tf$random$set_seed(as.integer(123))
```

```{r}
zip_path <- get_file(
  fname = "jena_climate_2009_2016.csv.zip",
  origin = "https://storage.googleapis.com/tensorflow/tf-keras-datasets/jena_climate_2009_2016.csv.zip",
  extract = TRUE
)

csv_path <- file.path(dirname(zip_path), "jena_climate_2009_2016.csv")
weather_data <- read.csv(csv_path)

glimpse(weather_data)
dim(weather_data)
head(weather_data)
```

```{r}
ggplot(weather_data[1:5000, ], aes(x = 1:5000, y = T..degC.)) +
  geom_line() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Temperature Over Time (First 5,000 Observations)",
    x = "Time Step",
    y = "Temperature (°C)"
  )
```

```{r}
sampling_rate <- as.integer(6)
sequence_length <- as.integer(120)
delay <- as.integer(144)
batch_size <- as.integer(256)

n <- nrow(weather_data)

train_end <- as.integer(round(0.5 * n))
val_end   <- as.integer(round(0.75 * n))

train_data <- weather_data[1:train_end, ]
val_data   <- weather_data[(train_end + 1):val_end, ]
test_data  <- weather_data[(val_end + 1):n, ]
```

```{r}
train_matrix <- as.matrix(train_data[, -1])
val_matrix   <- as.matrix(val_data[, -1])
test_matrix  <- as.matrix(test_data[, -1])

train_mean <- colMeans(train_matrix)
train_sd   <- apply(train_matrix, 2, sd)

train_matrix <- scale(train_matrix, center = train_mean, scale = train_sd)
val_matrix   <- scale(val_matrix, center = train_mean, scale = train_sd)
test_matrix  <- scale(test_matrix, center = train_mean, scale = train_sd)

target_col_index <- which(colnames(weather_data[, -1]) == "T..degC.")
target_col_index <- as.integer(target_col_index)
```

```{r}
make_dataset <- function(data_matrix, targets, sequence_length, delay,
                         sampling_rate = 6L, batch_size = 256L, shuffle = FALSE) {
  timeseries_dataset_from_array(
    data = data_matrix,
    targets = targets[(sequence_length + delay):length(targets)],
    sequence_length = as.integer(sequence_length),
    sampling_rate = as.integer(sampling_rate),
    batch_size = as.integer(batch_size),
    shuffle = shuffle,
    start_index = as.integer(0),
    end_index = as.integer(nrow(data_matrix) - delay - 1)
  )
}
```

```{r}
train_ds <- make_dataset(
  data_matrix = train_matrix,
  targets = train_data$T..degC.,
  sequence_length = sequence_length,
  delay = delay,
  sampling_rate = sampling_rate,
  batch_size = batch_size,
  shuffle = TRUE
)

val_ds <- make_dataset(
  data_matrix = val_matrix,
  targets = val_data$T..degC.,
  sequence_length = sequence_length,
  delay = delay,
  sampling_rate = sampling_rate,
  batch_size = batch_size,
  shuffle = FALSE
)

test_ds <- make_dataset(
  data_matrix = test_matrix,
  targets = test_data$T..degC.,
  sequence_length = sequence_length,
  delay = delay,
  sampling_rate = sampling_rate,
  batch_size = batch_size,
  shuffle = FALSE
)
```

```{r}
evaluate_naive <- function(dataset) {
  maes <- c()
  it <- reticulate::as_iterator(dataset)

  repeat {
    batch <- tryCatch(
      reticulate::iter_next(it),
      error = function(e) NULL
    )
    if (is.null(batch)) break
    inputs  <- batch[[1]]
    targets <- batch[[2]]
    preds  <- as.numeric(inputs[, dim(inputs)[2], target_col_index])
    actual <- as.numeric(targets)
    maes <- c(maes, mean(abs(preds - actual)))
  }
  mean(maes)
}

naive_mae <- evaluate_naive(val_ds)
naive_mae
```

```{r}
fit_model <- function(model, train_ds, val_ds, epochs = 10) {
  history <- model %>% fit(
    train_ds,
    epochs = as.integer(epochs),
    validation_data = val_ds,
    verbose = 0
  )

  metric_name <- if ("val_mae" %in% names(history$metrics)) {
    "val_mae"
  } else if ("val_mean_absolute_error" %in% names(history$metrics)) {
    "val_mean_absolute_error"
  } else {
    stop("Validation MAE metric not found in history$metrics")
  }

  tail(history$metrics[[metric_name]], 1)
}
```

```{r, results='hide'}
dense_model <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
  layer_flatten(input_shape = c(sequence_length, ncol(train_matrix))) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 32, activation = "relu") %>%
  layer_dropout(rate = 0.3) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 1)

dense_model %>% compile(
  optimizer = optimizer_rmsprop(),
  loss = "mse",
  metrics = list("mae")
)

dense_mae <- fit_model(dense_model, train_ds, val_ds)
```
```{r}
dense_mae
```

```{r, results='hide'}
lstm_model <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
  layer_lstm(
    units = 32,
    recurrent_dropout = 0.25,
    input_shape = c(sequence_length, ncol(train_matrix))
  ) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 1)

lstm_model %>% compile(
  optimizer = optimizer_rmsprop(),
  loss = "mse",
  metrics = list("mae")
)

lstm_mae <- fit_model(lstm_model, train_ds, val_ds)
```
```{r}
lstm_mae
```

```{r, results='hide'}
gru_model <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
  layer_gru(
    units = 32,
    recurrent_dropout = 0.25,
    input_shape = c(sequence_length, ncol(train_matrix))
  ) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 1)

gru_model %>% compile(
  optimizer = optimizer_rmsprop(),
  loss = "mse",
  metrics = list("mae")
)

gru_mae <- fit_model(gru_model, train_ds, val_ds)
```
```{r}
gru_mae
```

```{r, results='hide'}
stacked_gru <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
  layer_gru(
    units = 32,
    return_sequences = TRUE,
    recurrent_dropout = 0.25,
    input_shape = c(sequence_length, ncol(train_matrix))
  ) %>%
  layer_gru(
    units = 32,
    recurrent_dropout = 0.25
  ) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 1)

stacked_gru %>% compile(
  optimizer = optimizer_rmsprop(),
  loss = "mse",
  metrics = list("mae")
)

stacked_mae <- fit_model(stacked_gru, train_ds, val_ds)
```
```{r}
stacked_mae
```

```{r, results='hide'}
conv_gru <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
  layer_conv_1d(
    filters = 32,
    kernel_size = 5,
    activation = "relu",
    input_shape = c(sequence_length, ncol(train_matrix))
  ) %>%
  layer_max_pooling_1d(pool_size = 3) %>%
  layer_gru(units = 32) %>%
  layer_dense(units = 1)

conv_gru %>% compile(
  optimizer = optimizer_rmsprop(),
  loss = "mse",
  metrics = list("mae")
)

conv_mae <- fit_model(conv_gru, train_ds, val_ds)
```
```{r}
conv_mae
```

Now I am going to test GRU and Conv1D+GRU across unit sizes of 16, 32, 64, and 128. This will help determine how number of units effects performance.

```{r, results='hide'}
unit_sizes <- c(16, 32, 64, 128)

gru_unit_results <- map_dfr(unit_sizes, function(units) {
  model <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
    layer_gru(
      units = units,
      recurrent_dropout = 0.25,
      input_shape = c(sequence_length, ncol(train_matrix))
    ) %>%
    layer_dense(units = 1)

  model %>% compile(
    optimizer = optimizer_rmsprop(),
    loss = "mse",
    metrics = list("mae")
  )

  val_mae <- fit_model(model, train_ds, val_ds, epochs = 5)
  tibble(Model = paste0("GRU (", units, " units)"), MAE = val_mae)
})
```
```{r}
gru_unit_results
```

```{r, results='hide'}
conv_gru_unit_results <- map_dfr(unit_sizes, function(units) {
  model <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
    layer_conv_1d(
      filters = units,
      kernel_size = 5,
      activation = "relu",
      input_shape = c(sequence_length, ncol(train_matrix))
    ) %>%
    layer_max_pooling_1d(pool_size = 3) %>%
    layer_gru(units = units) %>%
    layer_dense(units = 1)

  model %>% compile(
    optimizer = optimizer_rmsprop(),
    loss = "mse",
    metrics = list("mae")
  )

  val_mae <- fit_model(model, train_ds, val_ds, epochs = 5)
  tibble(Model = paste0("Conv1D+GRU (", units, " units)"), MAE = val_mae)
})
```
```{r}
conv_gru_unit_results
```

## Summary of All Results

```{r}
results <- bind_rows(
  tibble(
    Model = c("Naive", "Dense", "LSTM", "GRU", "Stacked GRU", "Conv1D+GRU"),
    MAE = c(naive_mae, dense_mae, lstm_mae, gru_mae, stacked_mae, conv_mae)
  ),
  gru_unit_results,
  conv_gru_unit_results
) %>%
  arrange(MAE)

results
```

```{r}
results %>%
  ggplot(aes(x = reorder(Model, MAE), y = MAE)) +
  geom_col() +
  coord_flip() +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Validation MAE by Model and Unit Size",
    x = "Model",
    y = "Validation MAE"
  )
```

```{r}
best_model_name <- results$Model[1]
cat("Best model:", best_model_name, "\n")

get_units <- function(name) {
  m <- regmatches(name, regexpr("[0-9]+(?= units)", name, perl = TRUE))
  if (length(m) == 1) as.integer(m) else 32L
}

best_model <- if (best_model_name == "Dense") {
  dense_model
} else if (best_model_name == "LSTM") {
  lstm_model
} else if (best_model_name == "GRU") {
  gru_model
} else if (best_model_name == "Stacked GRU") {
  stacked_gru
} else if (best_model_name == "Conv1D+GRU") {
  conv_gru
} else if (grepl("^GRU \\(", best_model_name)) {
  u <- get_units(best_model_name)
  m <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
    layer_gru(units = u, recurrent_dropout = 0.25,
              input_shape = c(sequence_length, ncol(train_matrix))) %>%
    layer_dense(units = 1)
  m %>% compile(optimizer = optimizer_rmsprop(), loss = "mse", metrics = list("mae"))
  fit_model(m, train_ds, val_ds)
  m
} else if (grepl("^Conv1D\\+GRU \\(", best_model_name)) {
  u <- get_units(best_model_name)
  m <- keras_model_sequential() %>%
    layer_conv_1d(filters = u, kernel_size = 5, activation = "relu",
                  input_shape = c(sequence_length, ncol(train_matrix))) %>%
    layer_max_pooling_1d(pool_size = 3) %>%
    layer_gru(units = u) %>%
    layer_dense(units = 1)
  m %>% compile(optimizer = optimizer_rmsprop(), loss = "mse", metrics = list("mae"))
  fit_model(m, train_ds, val_ds)
  m
} else {
  NULL
}

if (!is.null(best_model)) {
  cat("\nTest set evaluation for:", best_model_name, "\n")
  test_metrics <- best_model %>% evaluate(test_ds, verbose = 0)
  print(test_metrics)
} else {
  cat("Naive baseline was best on validation; no neural network test evaluation run.\n")
}
```
